_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Solicit and manage to completion feedback from requestors on quality, timeliness, and effectiveness of collection against collection requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remediation workflows, and track resolution to closure.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-006 (AB, cosine: 0.382), DQ-S-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.376).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.1/10 (raw 0.407). Shared vocabulary: [quality]. DCWF-only terms [against, collection, completion, effectiveness, feedback, manage] vs WIDAI-only terms [assigned, closure, data, document, domain, initiate] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.860, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (88.3%). "Solicit and manage to completion feedback from requestors on quality, timeliness" and "Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remed" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.393 ≈ STS 0.407 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [quality] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [quality]. DCWF-only: [against, collection, completion, effectiveness, feedback, manage]. WIDAI-only: [assigned, closure, data, document, domain, initiate].
